item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-040","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response does not give a symmetric 'both sides have merit' compromise. It establishes a dominant judgment: old code being hard to maintain does not justify a full backend rewrite by default; the main decision frame is evidence-based, staged replacement unless system-level defects make local remediation insufficient. Pro-rewrite considerations are demoted to constraints/trigger conditions, matching the expected aspect arbitration behavior."}
